title: Agent Feedback Entry
description: One row in metrics/agent-feedback.jsonl. Logged when an agent missed an issue that was caught later. Drives past-misses injection and category vocab evolution.

task_id.description: Optional: link back to the pipeline.jsonl row that ran this agent. Triggers reviewer_misses_post_merge++ on that row when set.

category.description: MUST be a value from category-vocab.json under vocab[<agent>]. If a new pattern, set 'other' and populate proposed_new_category.

proposed_new_category.description: When category='other'. Reviewed by /learn for vocab promotion (≥3 confirmed instances → permanent).

pattern_to_look_for.description: Short, grep-friendly pattern. The string injected into reviewer prompts on future runs as past-miss data.

human_confirmed.description: True iff a human reviewed and accepted that this is a real miss. Only confirmed entries count toward vocab promotion and pattern auto-promotion.
